ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "host": Mule::p('http.requester.abacusSAPI.host'), "port": Mule::p('http.requester.abacusSAPI.port'), "basePath": Mule::p('http.requester.abacusSAPI.basePath'), "method": Mule::p('http.requester.abacusSAPI.financeQuoteSummary.method'), "path": Mule::p('http.requester.abacusSAPI.financeQuoteSummary.path'), "protocol": Mule::p('http.requester.abacusSAPI.protocol'), "timeout": Mule::p('http.requester.abacusSAPI.financeQuoteSummary.timeout'), "headers" :{ "x-country-code" : lower(attributes.properties.countryCode) default "", "x-correlation-id" : correlationId, "x-client-id" : Mule::p('http.requester.clientId'), "x-client-secret" : Mule::p('secure::http.requester.clientSecret'), "Accept-Language": vars.localeCode }, "uriParams":{ applicationId: payload.applicationId, financialCode: payload.financialCode } }
%dw 2.0 import p from Mule output application/java --- p('mq.applicationdlq')

ee:transform.doc:name: Prepare Request Mapping and Dynamic HTTP operation params

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "host": Mule::p('http.requester.abacusSAPI.host'), "port": Mule::p('http.requester.abacusSAPI.port'), "basePath": Mule::p('http.requester.abacusSAPI.basePath'), "method": Mule::p('http.requester.abacusSAPI.recursiveSearch.method'), "path": Mule::p('http.requester.abacusSAPI.recursiveSearch.path'), "protocol": Mule::p('http.requester.abacusSAPI.protocol'), "timeout": Mule::p('http.requester.abacusSAPI.recursiveSearch.timeout'), "headers" :{ "x-country-code" : lower(vars.countryCode), "x-correlation-id" : correlationId, "x-client-id" : Mule::p('http.requester.clientId'), "x-client-secret" : Mule::p('secure::http.requester.clientSecret'), "Accept-Language": vars.localeCode } }

ee:transform.doc:name: Prepare Request Mapping and Dynamic HTTP operation params

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "host": Mule::p('http.requester.salesforceAppMgmtSAPI.host'), "port": Mule::p('http.requester.salesforceAppMgmtSAPI.port'), "basePath": Mule::p('http.requester.salesforceAppMgmtSAPI.basePath'), "method": Mule::p('http.requester.salesforceAppMgmtSAPI.applicationDetails.method'), "path": Mule::p('http.requester.salesforceAppMgmtSAPI.applicationDetails.path'), "protocol": Mule::p('http.requester.salesforceAppMgmtSAPI.protocol'), "timeout": Mule::p('http.requester.salesforceAppMgmtSAPI.applicationDetails.timeout'), "headers" :{ "x-country-code" : lower(vars.countryCode), "x-correlation-id" : correlationId, "x-client-id" : Mule::p('http.requester.clientId'), "x-client-secret" : Mule::p('secure::http.requester.clientSecret'), "Accept-Language": vars.localeCode }, "uriParams":{ applicationId: vars.applnPayload.applicationId } }

logger.doc:name: Log Response
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "Application is created Succesfully for" ++ "\'Transaction\': " ++ correlationId ++ " \'countryCode\': " ++ vars.countryCode ++ " \'ApplicationId\': " ++ vars.applicationId]
